SEARCH
Package app.service.impl.indicators

Class IndicatorsServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
IndicatorsService
public class IndicatorsServiceImpl extends Object implements IndicatorsService
Concrete implementation of the IndicatorsService responsible for processing financial data records and executing mathematical models to compute traditional technical analysis indicators.

This service sequences raw price series to populate momentum, trend, volatility, and volume-weighted structures.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    (package private) static class 
    IndicatorsServiceImpl.AtrCalculator
    Internal mathematical engine modeling market volatility via Average True Range (ATR) metrics.
    (package private) static class 
    IndicatorsServiceImpl.CmfCalculator
    Internal mathematical engine implementing Chaikin Money Flow (CMF) metrics.
    (package private) static class 
    IndicatorsServiceImpl.MacdCalculator
    Internal mathematical engine parsing price moving convergence and divergence (MACD) attributes.
    (package private) static class 
    IndicatorsServiceImpl.RsiCalculator
    Internal mathematical engine evaluating directional velocity dynamics via Relative Strength Index (RSI) metrics.

  • Method Details

    • calculateRSInMACDnATRnCMF

      public List<FinancialIndicators> calculateRSInMACDnATRnCMF(FinancialIndicatorsPeriods periods)
      Simultaneously computes RSI, MACD, ATR, and CMF technical indicators.

      Pulls raw sequential market records directly from the global AppState and computes the analytical indicator cluster matching the user's specific window configuration.

      Specified by:
      calculateRSInMACDnATRnCMF in interface IndicatorsService
      Parameters:
      periods - A container holding the explicit period configurations for each indicator.
      Returns:
      A populated List containing the dto entities FinancialIndicators containing the results.

    • calculateRSInMACDnATRnCMF

      public List<FinancialIndicators> calculateRSInMACDnATRnCMF(List<DataRecord> records)
      Overloaded calculation route designed to compute technical indicators using an explicitly supplied list of data records and the fallback baseline FinancialIndicatorsPeriods.STANDARD_PERIODS.

      Typically utilized during background processing routines like dto training preparation where localized historical contextual sub-lists are processed.

      Parameters:
      records - The sequential list of raw DataRecord instances to analyze.
      Returns:
      A populated List containing compiled indicator entities, or an empty list if input is invalid.
